ground_truth.title: AI Consulting Services: Strategy, Integration & Development with LeverX
ground_truth.main_content:
What You Gain With LeverX AI Consulting
Partnering with LeverX means more than just technical implementation — it’s a long-term investment into your company’s AI maturity, operational efficiency, and innovation capacity. Here’s how we create lasting value:
Strategic clarity and direction
Discover AI use cases that truly match your business priorities and pain points
Prioritize initiatives based on feasibility, ROI, and long-term value
Align AI programs with digital transformation goals and cross-functional strategies
Make informed decisions based on unbiased, vendor-agnostic guidance
Build a scalable AI vision — not just a one-time project
Faster time-to-value with reduced risk
Validate concepts through PoCs or MVPs before committing to full investment
Avoid common architecture and integration pitfalls with expert-led planning
Ensure enterprise-grade security, compliance, and data privacy from day one
Reduce time-to-production with reusable components and proven frameworks
Anticipate risks early — from data gaps to organizational blockers — and plan mitigation strategies
Empowered teams and sustainable adoption
Align stakeholders through structured workshops and cross-functional sessions
Upskill internal teams with hands-on experience, training, and enablement
Reduce reliance on external vendors by building internal ownership
Establish governance models that support responsible, ongoing AI use
Long-term innovation and competitive edge
Embed AI into your product or service to create differentiated customer value
Unlock new revenue streams through automation, personalization, or predictive capabilities
Keep pace with evolving technologies like GenAI, RAG, and multimodal interfaces
Future-proof your AI strategy with architecture and models that adapt as you grow
AI Consulting Services Tailored to Your Business
Our approach goes beyond technology — we focus on building the right foundation, strategy, and solutions to ensure your AI initiatives deliver long-term value.
Data architecture consulting
We start by assessing your existing data infrastructure, systems, and governance. Then, we identify data gaps, bottlenecks, and integration challenges. Based on this, we define the foundation required to support scalable AI, from storage and access models to data quality improvements, ensuring your data landscape is ready for AI implementation.
AI strategy development
Through discovery workshops and collaborative sessions, we identify where AI can deliver real value for your business. We evaluate feasibility, prioritize use cases, and deliver a clear, step-by-step roadmap that aligns technical implementation with business objectives, giving you clarity before development begins.
AI solution development
Once the strategy is defined, our team designs and builds a tailored AI solution, from PoC or MVP to full-scale deployment. We ensure that the solution integrates with your systems, meets internal and regulatory requirements, and is optimized for long-term use and adaptation.
Generative AI adoption
We help you introduce GenAI tools into your workflows safely and effectively. This includes selecting the right models, defining how they’ll be used, integrating them into real processes, and setting up guardrails around privacy, compliance, and content quality — all while keeping deployment fast and focused.
GenAI model tuning
If you already use GenAI but need it to better align with the domain-specific knowledge, language, and logic, we help you fine-tune the GenAI models. Using techniques like RAG, prompt engineering, and embedding your business data, we customize LLMs to align with your terminology, logic, and compliance rules, improving relevance and reducing hallucination.
AI design sessions and workshops
We conduct structured sessions with your stakeholders to explore potential use cases, validate assumptions, and co-design AI-enabled experiences. These workshops are not theoretical — they’re working sessions that move you from idea to concept, supported by visuals, scenarios, and expert facilitation.
Technologies That Power Our AI Solutions
Models we work with:
GPT-4, Claude, Llama 3, PaLM-2, Stable Diffusion, DALL·E 2, Phi-2, Whisper, Google Gemini, Mistral, Bloom 560m
AI & ML frameworks:
TensorFlow, Detectron2, LangChain, Hugging Face, Core ML, ML Kit, Librosa, OpenCV
Data platforms:
Databricks, Snowflake, ClickHouse, Apache Airflow, Kafka
Cloud services:
AWS, Microsoft Azure, Google Cloud Platform
Embedding providers:
OpenAI, Vertex AI, open-source & proprietary embeddings
Our AI App Development Process
Our development process is designed to transform complex business challenges into smart, scalable AI applications. Every stage is focused on delivering tangible results, from idea to implementation.
1
Discovery
The process begins with a deep understanding of your business needs and goals. We thoroughly analyze your current systems, identify key challenges, and explore relevant AI use cases. These insights allow us to align the solution with your strategic objectives and ensure it delivers measurable value.
2
AI solution design
Based on the gathered insights, we will collaborate with you to define the features and capabilities of the AI application. We choose the right AI models (e.g., machine learning, natural language processing, deep learning) and design a solution architecture that meets your requirements.
3
PoC / MVP development
To validate the feasibility of the AI solution, we develop a PoC or MVP. This stage allows you to test the core functionality, assess the AI models, and gather feedback. It also helps reduce risks and confirm the value proposition before committing to full-scale development.
4
Preprocessing
AI applications rely heavily on data. We collect, clean, and preprocess the necessary datasets to train and fine-tune the AI models. This stage is crucial to ensure data quality and remove biases, which impact the accuracy and performance of the AI system.
5
AI model development & training
Once the data is ready, our data scientists develop AI models to drive your app's intelligence. The models are trained using the prepared datasets and then tested to ensure they meet performance benchmarks. We iterate and refine the models to enhance their accuracy and effectiveness.
6
App development
With the AI models in place, we begin developing the application itself. We ensure it integrates seamlessly with your existing systems, platforms, and workflows. This stage includes designing the user interface (UI) and user experience (UX) to create an intuitive and engaging application.
7
Quality assurance
Before launch, rigorous testing ensures the AI app is reliable, secure, and performs as expected. We test for bugs, scalability, security vulnerabilities, as well as ensure that AI models make accurate predictions and perform optimally. We also validate that the app meets industry-specific standards and regulations.
8
Deployment
Once testing is complete and everything is in place, we launch the AI app in the production environment. We ensure smooth deployment by monitoring performance and handling potential issues during the initial go-live phase.
9
Post-launch monitoring
AI systems require continuous tuning and optimization to maintain peak performance. After deployment, we track the AI app's performance in real-time, collect user feedback, and fine-tune the models as needed, ensuring ongoing improvement and seamless adaptation to evolving business needs or data trends.
10
Support
We offer continuous support and maintenance to keep your AI application running smoothly. Whether resolving technical issues, updating AI models, or scaling the application, we ensure your AI solution remains cutting-edge and aligned with your business goals.
Industries We Serve
By combining advanced AI capabilities with domain-specific expertise, we deliver tailored solutions that solve real-world industry challenges and create lasting business value.
Automotive
Industrial Manufacturing
Transportation & Logistics
Metals & mining
Chemicals
Retail & Wholesale
Banking & Finance
Healthcare
Pharmaceuticals & Life Science
Why LeverX?
Proven track record
For over 20 years, we have been helping companies worldwide achieve success. We have completed over 1500 projects for more than 900 clients, including leading companies from the Fortune 500 list.
40+ successful AI projects
LeverX has a strong track record of helping businesses transform data into actionable insights with AI. This hands-on experience allows us to tailor AI solutions to real-world challenges, delivering measurable value and long-term scalability.
Databricks partnership
As a Databricks Consulting Partner, LeverX brings advanced data and AI capabilities to accelerate innovation. This partnership reflects our ongoing commitment to empowering clients with cutting-edge technologies and data-driven insights.
Quality and security
LeverX operates in compliance with international standards such as ISO 9001, ISO 27001, ISO 22301, and ISO 55001, ensuring reliability and quality in every project.
Investment in innovation
We dedicate over 10K man-hours annually to researching innovative technologies. By integrating advanced solutions such as data science, IoT, AI, big data, and blockchain, we help clients efficiently address their business challenges.
Flexibility
Our team helps you deploy projects quickly, maintain process transparency, and adapt each development phase to meet your specific requirements.
FAQ
What does an AI readiness assessment actually include?
Our AI readiness assessment covers three main areas:
Data
— we analyze data availability, quality, structure, and governance.
Technology
— we review existing systems, integration options, and architecture fit.
Organization
— we assess stakeholder alignment, AI maturity, and process readiness
This gives you a clear picture of what’s needed before starting implementation — and whether a quick PoC or foundational work should come first.
What steps do you take to reduce risks during an AI project?
We use a phased, low-risk delivery model built around early validation and transparency:
Start with small-scale PoCs to test assumptions
Use frameworks like CRISP-DM to guide each stage, from exploration to deployment
Conduct technical risk assessments, privacy audits, and compliance checks
Involve stakeholders early and continuously to reduce misalignment
This helps avoid expensive rework, delays, or "AI that nobody uses".
How long does it take to implement an AI solution?
The timeline depends on scope and complexity. A focused PoC can take 4–6 weeks. Full production systems, especially those integrated with ERP, CRM, or legacy platforms, may require 3–6 months. We define a clear timeline during the planning phase, with early checkpoints to show progress and gather feedback.
What budget should we expect for AI consulting and development?
Budgets vary based on project type: workshops and strategy-only engagements are more affordable, while end-to-end custom development requires more investment. We offer flexible models, from fixed-price assessments to time & materials delivery, and always provide cost transparency upfront. Wherever possible, we reuse components or prebuilt frameworks to reduce overall cost.
What’s different about implementing generative AI compared to other AI?
Generative AI (like LLMs) requires careful planning beyond typical machine learning:
Prompt design
and
guardrail setup
to ensure relevant and safe outputs
Data grounding
and context injection for domain accuracy
Monitoring
to detect hallucinations or compliance issues
We guide you through all of this and help define clear use cases where GenAI adds value, rather than creating unnecessary complexity.
What level of involvement is required from our internal team?
We handle the technical heavy lifting, but meaningful input from your side ensures success. Typically, we involve business owners (to validate use cases), IT (for access and architecture), and data owners (to align on quality and availability). We tailor collaboration based on your capacity — from fully guided engagements to co-creation formats.
Show more
CONTACT US
If you are looking for an SAP Global Strategic Supplier or Technology Partner for your business, fill out the form below, and we will contact you at short notice.
